title: County Line Report
tagline: A small headline with too many proper nouns.

fragment.raw_ocr: Frat Dispute Conference on Today i Students Meet With E C Gra i ham Peyser Criticizes Policy of Unofficial Discussions The high school fraternity squab ble may be settled out of court I This was indicated today when E l C Graham of the School Board an nounced a conference this afternoon with representatives of high school I fraternities On the heels of yesterdays con ference in Grahams office to dis cuss the legal aspects of the fra ternity case todays meetingfurther I indicates the lengths to which school officials are going to settle the dis pute Mondays secret meeting of the I board was called to make plans to investigate the fraternities Meanwhile the essential issues of I the fight may be settled in confer ence Would Avoid Court 1 I Fraternity leaders are anxious to avoid a court test of the boards right to regulate their organizations I A program of lobbying privately for a hearing which we have been unable to secure publicly was be gun by fraternity leaders yesterday Board members were interviewed by a committee selected by outlaw or ganizations Attitude Unchanged A poll of board members today showed no change in the attitude which
